title: IIFL Finance is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)

jsonLd.title: IIFL Finance is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
IIFL Finance is actively seeking a talented and motivated Credit Analyst to join our dynamic team in Ghaziabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About IIFL Finance:
IIFL Finance is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIFL Finance!
